# OSMM Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

Thank you for contributing to OSMM ("Open Systems Makerspace Manager"). OSMM is a collaborative
project: contributions from the wider makerspace community are welcome and encouraged. This
agreement keeps OSMM's licensing model workable while making sure contributors are recognized and
rewarded — see **[CONTRIBUTOR-BENEFITS.md](CONTRIBUTOR-BENEFITS.md)**.

By submitting a contribution (a pull request, patch, or any other change) to an OSMM-HQ repository,
**you agree to the following.**

## 1. Definitions

- **"You"** means the individual or legal entity making the contribution.
- **"Contribution"** means any original work of authorship — code, documentation, or other
  materials — that you intentionally submit to OSMM-HQ for inclusion in OSMM.
- **"OSMM-HQ"** means the maintainers of OSMM and their successors, the holder of OSMM's copyright
  and commercial rights.

## 2. You keep your copyright

You retain all right, title, and interest in your Contribution. This agreement grants OSMM-HQ
licenses to your Contribution; it does **not** transfer ownership. You remain free to use your own
Contribution however you like, elsewhere.

## 3. Copyright license and right to relicense

You grant OSMM-HQ a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright
license to reproduce, modify, distribute, and create derivative works of your Contribution, **and
to sublicense and relicense your Contribution under any terms** — including the PolyForm
Noncommercial License, the additional grants in
[PERMISSIONS.md](../PERMISSIONS.md), and OSMM-HQ's separate **commercial** licenses.

This is what allows OSMM-HQ to remain the single party able to grant commercial licenses (see
[COMMERCIAL.md](../COMMERCIAL.md)) even though the code is written by many people.

## 4. Patent license

You grant OSMM-HQ and all recipients of OSMM a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free,
irrevocable patent license to make, use, sell, and otherwise exploit your Contribution, for any
patent claims you can license that are necessarily infringed by your Contribution.

## 5. Commercial rights remain with OSMM-HQ

You understand and agree that the right to commercialize OSMM — to sell commercial licenses, to
offer it as a paid product or hosted service, or to bundle it commercially — is **reserved
exclusively to OSMM-HQ**. In return, contributors receive the benefits described in
[CONTRIBUTOR-BENEFITS.md](CONTRIBUTOR-BENEFITS.md).

## 6. Your representations

You represent that:

- each Contribution is your original creation, or you have the right to submit it under this
  agreement;
- if your employer has rights to intellectual property you create, you have permission to make the
  Contribution on behalf of that employer, or your employer has waived such rights; and
- your Contribution does not knowingly violate any third party's rights.

## 7. No warranty; no obligation

Your Contribution is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind, and you are not expected to
provide support for it. OSMM-HQ is under no obligation to use or merge any Contribution.

---

**How to sign:** pull requests to OSMM-HQ repositories are gated by an automated CLA check. The
first time you open a pull request you will be asked to accept this agreement by commenting the
confirmation phrase; merging is blocked until you do. If you are contributing on behalf of an
organization, ensure you are authorized to accept on its behalf.
